creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Commit log for graphics/glslang is here: https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/log/graphics/glslang

Test result (build multimedia/ffmpeg4 with different version of the graphics/glslang):
13.0.0 build fine.
13.1.0 configure fails: can't find libglslang.
14.0.0 build fails: use of undeclared identifier 'assert'.
